sub_pixel_system.notes: No sub-pixel system data documented for NES version

special_mechanics.name: Combat Mode
special_mechanics.description: Initiated upon touching enemies. Player can dodge, swing and stab with sword

special_mechanics.name: Magic Carpet Flight
special_mechanics.description: Certain levels allow player to possess a flying magic carpet

special_mechanics.name: Levitation Spell
special_mechanics.description: Castable spell for vertical movement in certain levels

special_mechanics.name: Barrel Paddling
special_mechanics.description: Player can paddle a floating barrel for water traversal

special_mechanics.name: Isometric Movement
special_mechanics.description: Game uses isometric perspective for character movement through labyrinth

tier_notes: T3 data - No precise movement physics values documented. Sources provide gameplay descriptions and narrative context but lack mechanical parameters. Game emphasizes puzzle-solving and careful navigation over fluid platforming physics.
sources_used: The Cutting Room Floor - The Immortal (NES)
